task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare application's main map or home screen is visible on the device.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Preferences or Settings menu
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Preferences or Settings menu of the Avare app is displayed.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Traffic or Alerts settings section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sub-menu within Preferences specifically related to Traffic, Display, or Alerts is visible, showing options for traffic warnings.

task_completion.description: Set the Traffic Warning Distance to 5 miles
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings dialog or list item for 'Traffic Warning Distance' (or similar wording) clearly shows the value set to '5'.

task_completion.description: Set the Traffic Warning Vertical (Height) to 1500 feet
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings dialog or list item for 'Traffic Warning Vertical', 'Traffic Warning Height', or similar wording clearly shows the value set to '1500'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the app's GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Avare app's graphical menus and dialogs. There should be no terminal emulator open editing the com.ds.avare_preferences.xml file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Avare application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the genuine Avare Android application, not a text editor, web browser, or note-taking app containing the target values.

integrity.description: Verify the values were entered into the correct configuration fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers '5' and '1500' must be entered into their respective specific setting dialogs or input fields, not merely typed into a general search bar or unrelated text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Avare app package name is com.ds.avare. Its preferences are stored in /data/data/com.ds.avare/shared_prefs/com.ds.avare_preferences.xml. The agent must configure the settings through the Avare app's UI, not by directly editing this XML file via terminal.
